entries.title: Doc-drift detection flow
entries.description: PM detects doc drift, DocM fixes. PM→DocM→DeployM flow for doc-code alignment.

entries.title: File registry
entries.description: DocM maintains file registry via src/docm_registry.py. Persistent cross-session file tracking stored in ~/.claude/projects/.../memory/docm-file-registry.json. Count as of 2026-03-04 was 98 files registered, 0 missing — but multiple new scripts were added since then (scripts/build/build_plugin_catalog.py, scripts/enrich/retag_data_ai_bulk.py, scripts/enrich/retag_integ_bulk.py, scripts/review/check_claude_trigger.py, scripts/review/check_git_trigger.py, scripts/verify/rescore_from_scanner.py, skills/ directory). Count is stale — DocM must re-run registry scan to get accurate count.

entries.title: CLAUDE.md is auto-loaded — keep it canonical and current
entries.description: CLAUDE.md is automatically loaded by Claude Code at session start. It is the single source of truth for agent rules, model routing, project structure, and build commands. When workflows or commands change, CLAUDE.md must be updated first. DocM is responsible for catching CLAUDE.md drift against code.

entries.title: SM --type flag: CLAUDE.md drift fixed 2026-03-04
entries.description: CLAUDE.md Build Commands section updated to show all three SM_TARGETS forms: default (no type filter), --type mcp (MCP servers only), --type agent (agent skills only). Also added scripts/memory/ to CLAUDE.md Project Structure block. Drift was identified in docm-k-003/004 and resolved in this session.

entries.title: New scripts added 2026-03-04 — Global Quick Nav updated
entries.description: The following scripts were added to the project and registered in the DocM file registry and Global Quick Nav in roles/DOCUMENTATION_MANAGER.md: scripts/review/sm_select_targets.py, scripts/review/sm_evolve.py, scripts/review/tag_skillsmp.py, scripts/review/check_claude_trigger.py, scripts/review/check_git_trigger.py, scripts/memory/memm_health_check.py, scripts/enrich/retag_data_ai_bulk.py, scripts/enrich/retag_integ_bulk.py. All 9 memory/structured/*.json files also added to Quick Nav.
